Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/YatCC/test/common.py:
     1	import json
     2	import os
     3	import sys
     4	import math
     5	from typing import Optional
     6	from dataclasses import dataclass, field
     7	import argparse
     8	
     9	
    10	@dataclass
    11	class CasesHelper:
    12	    """评分测例助手"""
    13	
    14	    @dataclass
    15	    class Case:
    16	        name: str
    17	        weight: float
    18	        input: Optional[str]
    19	
    20	    srcdir: str
    21	    """测例源目录"""
    22	
    23	    bindir: str
    24	    """测例输出目录"""
    25	
    26	    cases: list[Case] = field(default_factory=lambda: [])
    27	    """测例表"""
    28	
    29	    @staticmethod
    30	    def load_file(srcdir: str, bindir: str, path: str) -> "CasesHelper":
    31	        """从文件加载测例表
    32	
    33	        :param str srcdir: 测例源目录
    34	        :param str bindir: 测例输出目录
    35	        :param str path: 测例表文件路径
    36	        """
    37	
    38	        ret = CasesHelper(srcdir, bindir)
    39	
    40	        with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    41	            for line in f:
    42	                if line.startswith("#"):
    43	                    continue  # 跳过注释行
    44	
    45	                splits = line.split()
    46	                if not splits:
    47	                    continue
    48	
    49	                assert len(splits) <= 2, "权重文件格式错误：每行至多两列"
    50	                if len(splits) == 1:
    51	                    (name,) = splits
    52	                    weight = 1.0
    53	                else:
    54	                    name, weight = splits
    55	                    weight = float(weight)
    56	
    57	                assert name.endswith(".sysu.c")
    58	
    59	                input_path = os.path.join(
    60	                    srcdir,
    61	                    name.removesuffix(".sysu.c") + ".in",
    62	                )
    63	                if not os.path.exists(input_path):
    64	                    input_path = None
    65	
    66	                ret.cases.append(
    67	                    CasesHelper.Case(name=name, weight=weight, input=input_path)
    68	                )
    69	
    70	        return ret
    71	
    72	    def of_srcdir(self, relpath: str) -> str:
    73	        """返回源目录下的文件路径
    74	
    75	        :param str relpath: 相对路径
    76	        :return str: 绝对路径
    77	        """
    78	        return os.path.abspath(os.path.join(self.srcdir, relpath))
    79	
    80	    def of_bindir(self, relpath: str, mkdir=False) -> str:
    81	        """返回输出目录下的文件路径
    82	
    83	        :param str relpath: 相对路径
    84	        :param bool mkdir: 是否创建父目录
    85	        :return str: 绝对路径
    86	        """
    87	        path = os.path.abspath(os.path.join(self.bindir, relpath))
    88	        if mkdir:
    89	            os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(path), exist_ok=True)
    90	        return path
    91	
    92	    def of_case_bindir(self, relpath: str, case: Case, mkdir=False) -> str:
    93	        """返回测例输出目录下的文件路径
    94	
    95	        :param str relpath: 相对路径
    96	        :param Case case: 测例
    97	        :param bool mkdir: 是否创建父目录
    98	        :return str: 绝对路径
    99	        """
   100	        return self.of_bindir(os.path.join(case.name, relpath), mkdir)
   101	
   102	    def open_autograder_json(self, name: str = "score.json"):
   103	        """打开 Autograder 使用的 JSON 文件
   104	
   105	        :param str name: JSON 文件名，默认为 score.json
   106	        """
   107	
   108	        path = self.of_bindir(name, True)
   109	        return path, open(path, "w", encoding="utf-8")
   110	
   111	    def open_root_report(self, name: str = "score.txt"):
   112	        """打开总评分报告文件
   113	
   114	        :param str name: 报告文件名，默认为 score.txt
   115	        """
   116	        
   117	        path = self.of_bindir(name, True)
   118	        return path, open(path, "w", encoding="utf-8")
   119	
   120	    def open_case_report(self, case: Case):
   121	        """打开单测例评分报告文件"""
   122	        path = self.of_case_bindir("score.txt", case)
   123	        return path, open(path, "w", encoding="utf-8")
   124	
   125	    def open_outerr(self, name: str):
   126	        """打开用于重定向子进程 stdout 和 stderr 的两个文件"""
   127	        path_out = self.of_bindir(f"{name}.stdout", True)
   128	        path_err = self.of_bindir(f"{name}.stderr", True)
   129	        return (path_out, open(path_out, "wb"), path_err, open(path_err, "wb"))
   130	
   131	    def open_case_outerr(self, case: Case, name: str):
   132	        """打开测例目录中用于重定向子进程 stdout 和 stderr 的两个文件"""
   133	        path_out = self.of_case_bindir(f"{name}.stdout", case, True)
   134	        path_err = self.of_case_bindir(f"{name}.stderr", case, True)
   135	        return (path_out, open(path_out, "wb"), path_err, open(path_err, "wb"))
   136	
   137	    def open_case_input(self, case: Case):
   138	        """打开测例输入文件"""
   139	        path = case.input
   140	        if path is None:
   141	            return None, None
   142	        return (path, open(path, "rb"))
   143	
   144	
   145	@dataclass
   146	class ScoreReport:
   147	    """评分报告"""
   148	
   149	    @dataclass
   150	    class TestEntry:
   151	        name: str  # 为测例的相对路径
   152	        score: int
   153	        max_score: int
   154	        output: str = ""
   155	        output_path: str = ""
   156	        weight: float = 1.0
   157	
   158	    @dataclass
   159	    class LeaderBoardEntry:
   160	        name: str
   161	        value: float
   162	        order: int
   163	        is_desc: bool
   164	        suffix: str = ""
   165	
   166	    title: str
   167	    tests: list[TestEntry] = field(default_factory=lambda: [])
   168	    leader_board: list[LeaderBoardEntry] = field(default_factory=lambda: [])
   169	
   170	    def final_score(self) -> float:
   171	        """计算最终得分（总分）
   172	
   173	        :return float: 最终得分
   174	        """
   175	
   176	        return sum(i.score * i.weight / len(self.tests) for i in self.tests)
   177	
   178	    def final_max_score(self) -> float:
   179	        """计算最终满分
   180	
   181	        :return float: 最终满分
   182	        """
   183	
   184	        return sum(i.max_score * i.weight / len(self.tests) for i in self.tests)
   185	
   186	    def dump_autograder(self, fp, output_prefix="") -> None:
   187	        """转储 Autograder 使用的 JSON 文件
   188	
   189	        https://autograder-docs.howardlau.me/user-guide/docker-image-specification/
   190	
   191	        :param str fp: 输出文件
   192	        :param str output_prefix: output_path 的前缀
   193	        """
   194	
   195	        jobj = {
   196	            "tests": [
   197	                {
   198	                    "name": i.name,
   199	                    "score": math.ceil(i.score),
   200	                    "max_score": math.ceil(i.max_score),
   201	                    "output": i.output,
   202	                    "output_path": os.path.join(output_prefix, i.output_path),
   203	                }
   204	                for i in self.tests
   205	            ],
   206	            "leaderboard": [
   207	                {
   208	                    "name": i.name,
   209	                    "value": '{:.2f}'.format(i.value),
   210	                    "order": i.order,
   211	                    "is_desc": i.is_desc,
   212	                    "suffix": i.suffix,
   213	                }
   214	                for i in self.leader_board
   215	            ],
   216	        }
   217	        json.dump(jobj, fp, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
   218	
   219	    def dump_human_text(self, fp):
   220	        """转储供人直接阅读的文本文件
   221	
   222	        :param str fp: 输出文件
   223	        """
   224	
   225	        print(
   226	            f"{self.title}\n总分（加权）："
   227	            + f"{self.final_score():.2f}/{self.final_max_score():.2f}\n",
   228	            file=fp,
   229	        )
   230	
   231	        # 计算首列宽
   232	        name_col_len = max(len(i.name) for i in self.tests) + 2
   233	
   234	        for i in self.tests:
   235	            print(
   236	                f"{i.name:<{name_col_len}}"
   237	                + f"{i.score:>6.2f}/{i.max_score:<6.2f} "
   238	                + i.output,
   239	                file=fp,
   240	            )
   241	
   242	    def print(self, fp=sys.stdout):
   243	        """打印成绩单
   244	
   245	        与 dump_text 的区别在于限制了最大列宽，避免显示在屏幕上乱掉。
   246	
   247	        :param fp: 输出文件
   248	        """
   249	
   250	        for i in self.tests:
   251	            col1 = i.name
   252	            if len(col1) > 60:
   253	                col1 = "... " + col1[-55:]
   254	            col1 = f"{col1 + ' ':.<60}"
   255	
   256	            col2 = f" {i.score:.2f}"
   257	            col2 = f"{col2:.>6}/{i.max_score:.2f}"
   258	
   259	            print(col1, col2, file=fp, sep="...")
   260	
   261	        print(
   262	            f"\n{self.title}\n总分（加权）："
   263	            + f"{self.final_score():.2f}/{self.final_max_score():.2f}",
   264	            file=fp,
   265	        )
   266	
   267	
   268	def print_parsed_args(
   269	    parser: argparse.ArgumentParser,
   270	    args: argparse.Namespace,
   271	):
   272	    """打印程序解析到的参数"""
   273	
   274	    for action in parser._actions:
   275	        if action.dest == "help":
   276	            continue
   277	        print(
   278	            action.help,
   279	            getattr(args, action.dest),
   280	        )
   281	    print()
   282	
   283	
   284	def exit_if_cases_cached(bindir: str, cases_file: str) -> bytes:
   285	    """如果测例表已缓存，退出程序
   286	
   287	    :param str bindir: 测例输出目录
   288	    :param str cases_file: 测例表路径
   289	    :param str cache_name: 缓存文件名
   290	    :return bytes: 新的缓存文件内容
   291	    """
   292	
   293	    cases_cache = os.path.join(bindir, "cases.cache")
   294	    with open(cases_file, "rb") as f:
   295	        new = f.read()
   296	    if os.path.exists(cases_cache):
   297	        with open(cases_cache, "rb") as f:
   298	            old = f.read()
   299	        if new == old:
   300	            print("测例表已缓存，什么都不用做")
   301	            sys.exit(0)
   302	    return new
   303	
   304	
   305	def cache_cases(bindir: str, content: bytes):
   306	    cases_cache = os.path.join(bindir, "cases.cache")
   307	    with open(cases_cache, "wb") as f:
   308	        f.write(content)
   309	
   310	
   311	if __name__ == "__main__":
   312	    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser("提取测例表首列为 CMake 列表")
   313	    parser.add_argument("srcdir", type=str, help="测例源码目录")
   314	    parser.add_argument("bindir", type=str, help="测例输出目录")
   315	    parser.add_argument("cases_file", type=str, help="测例表路径")
   316	    args = parser.parse_args()
   317	
   318	    cases_helper = CasesHelper.load_file(
   319	        args.srcdir,
   320	        args.bindir,
   321	        args.cases_file,
   322	    )
   323	    print(";".join(i.name for i in cases_helper.cases))
   324
